original_image_tags: Hand-drawn sketch in white chalk or pencil on a dark background. The drawing depicts a long, lenticular or disc-shaped object in a side profile view. The object is wider in the center and tapers to points at both ends. Below the main object is a smaller, similar shape, possibly representing the object from a different angle or at a different scale. To the right of the main object, there are three small, cloud-like or puffy shapes drawn. A horizontal line with arrowheads at both ends spans the length of the main object, labeled "/20 FT/" in the center. The drawing is oriented horizontally across the lower half of the page.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned black-and-white document page with typed narrative text at the top and a chalk-style hand-drawn sketch at the bottom showing a large elongated object with a smaller oval shape on top, a horizontal arrow labeled “200 ft,” and several small profile drawings beneath it; “RESTRICTED” is stamped at the top and bottom, and two binder hole punches are visible along the left edge.*
